titleStmt.title: SII 29.98: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 98. (A.R. No. B. 565 of 1961-62.) KALLŪR, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the wall of the Māraṭēśvara temple.

It states that when Bhūlōkamalla was ruling the empire from the capital Kalyāṇa. mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Būchidēvarasa of the Haihaya family made a land grant to the god Māraṭēśvara of agrahāra Kallūru in the presence of all the mahājanas of the village. The donor was governing Mudugundūru-300 from his headquarters at Mudugundūru fort. It has also recorded a land grant made by hegaḍe Chavutaṇa to the same god.

The record is dated in the regnal year 9 of Bhūlōkamalla [Somēśvara III], Ānanda, Pushya, śu. 11 Friday, uttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa. It corresponds to 1134 A.D., December 29, Saturday, [f.d.t. 06]. There was no saṁkramaṇa on that day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī namastuṁga śiraccuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . bahubhirvvasudhādbhi rājabhi ssagarādhipa yasya yasya yadā
mi stayya tasyatadā phalaṁ . © svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrī matsarvvajña cakravarti bhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta
rōttarābhivṛddhi pravardhamānamācaṁdrākka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇa
purada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpāda
padmōpajīvigaḷappa śrī sastyanēka bhaṁgura taraṁga saṁghāta nicita lavaṇābdhava
ḷaya vaḷayitavēḷāvana pāriyātra tanmadhya dēśādhīśvara māhiṣma
tī puravarādhīśvara sahasrabāhu pratāpabhūpa diḷīpa Ahihaya vaṁśōdbha
va vivēka vanajōdbhavanatyugra naraśirōdarppaṇa dhvaja virājamāna dānakānīna māle pa
ṟe bhūṣaṇaṁ nrivaratna bhūṣaṇaṁ satyavikhyāta nītimāṁdhāta budhaja
nastutyaṁ nayyaṇāditya virōdhi maṁḍaḷika (śu)ṁḍāḷa paṁcānana samaraṣaḍānana śā
caturmmukha maṁneya goṁdaḷaṁ (ga)baḍiva siḍilamārkkoḷva
ḷa gaṁḍa Ubhaya jaṁguḷi manneyara mālegōva baṁṭarabāva permmāḍiya
kakāṟa raṇaraṁga nīṟa tappetappuvaḷa maguḷdaṭṭeṟeppuva mūppuri manneyara
parāṁganā putra gōtrapavitra sukavinikara
śukamākaṁda naṁdana lōkāṁbikā naṁdana śrīkēśavadēvara pādābjabhṛṁga sāhasō
ttuṁga nāmādi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ cūbūcidēvara
saru muduguṁdūru munnūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷana
di nijarājadhāniyappa maduguṁdūra kōṭeyoḷubhaya sāmyamanā
ḷuttaḷi(li)rddu śrībhūlōkamalla varṣada 9 neyānaṁda saṁvatsarada puṣya suddha 11 su
kravāra daṁduttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa nimittadiṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ bū
cidēvarasaru śrīmatsarvvanamanaśyadagrahāṁ kallūra Aśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷa
sannidhānadalu śrīsvayaṁbhu māraṭēśvara dēvaraṁgabhōgakke śrīmadvikramāditya bha
ṭṭayyaga(ḷa) biṭṭa keyyiṁda nintaraṁ gobbūra dāriyiṁ paḍuval
daśavaṁda bhūmiyoḷage hiriya kōlalu hannirmmattaru keyyaṁdhārā
pūrvvakaṁ māḍi yācaṁdrārka tāraṁ biṭṭaru © hegaḍe cavutaṇaṁ daśava
ṁda bhūmiyalli tārāṟagalli paḍuvalu Ondu mattakkeyyaṁ śrī māraṭēśvaradēvara
ha dakke biṭṭaru . Iṁtī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge śrī vāraṇāsiyalli sāsira kavile
yaṁ koḍukoḷagu mahallida baḍḍiṟeda kaṭṭisi sāsirvvaṣada pāragavappa brāhmaṇargge Athadiṁge
koṭa phaḷamakku tadharmmamamanārānuvaḷida ghātakargge sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsirvvavēda pāraṁgatarppa
brāhmaṇarumaṁ śrī vāraṇāsiyalli koṁdaṁtappa pāpaṁ sārggu . ślōka . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētu
nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālaniyō bhavadbhiḥ nētānbhāvina(ṁ) pārttivēṁdrānbhūyōbhayō
yācatē rāma (bha)draḥ [.] (svadattaṁ paradattaṁ) vāyōharētu vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
